content:
# Overall Project Summary: May 22, 2026

Development on May 22 focused on hardening mobile and cloud infrastructure, highlighted by the transition to a two-tier Hetzner control plane and the implementation of local voice and sandbox routing for mobile platforms. System stability was further improved through proactive LifeOps inbox management and the deprecation of legacy container features, ensuring a more streamlined agent architecture.

## ✅ Completed Work

**Mobile & Sandbox Infrastructure**
*   Enabled local voice and sandbox routing for mobile platforms to support remote-mode plugins ([elizaos/eliza#7850](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7850)).
*   Refined planner and tool contracts to stabilize gpt-oss routing and OpenCode handoffs ([elizaos/eliza#7881](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7881)).
*   Optimized `chip` package scripts to enhance Linux external BSP checks and reporting ([elizaos/eliza#7877](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7877)).

**Cloud & Infrastructure Refactoring**
*   Migrated to a two-tier Hetzner architecture using Terraform IaC and deprecated legacy milady-core components ([elizaos/eliza#7890](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7890)).
*   Consolidated dashboard functionality by removing unused container CRUD features in favor of the agents UI ([elizaos/eliza#7886](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7886)).
*   Improved hardware authentication via Steward checkout callbacks and corrected cloud frontend i18n strings ([elizaos/eliza#7891](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7891), [elizaos/eliza#7892](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7892)).

**System Stability & Maintenance**
*   Enhanced LifeOps inbox digests to prevent chat connector memories from cluttering personal items ([elizaos/eliza#7889](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7889)).
*   Resolved test collisions and improved code quality through Slack WebClient type cleanup and service type migrations ([elizaos/eliza#7882](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7882), [elizaos/eliza#7880](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7880)).

## 🏗️ Work in Progress

**New Pull Requests**
*   **elizaos/eliza**: [fix(os-rv64): keep release gates source-only honest](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7893)

**Active Discussions**
*   **elizaos/eliza**: [Issue #7748](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7748) - The Unified DeFi Router tool is now live and functional via a centralized API, providing optimal swap and bridge routes for agents.
